sectionSubtitle: Please help us plan Uni-Con by filling in the forms below.

forms.title: Uni-Con (Unimelb Anime Convention) — Expression of Interest
forms.desc: Tell us if you’d attend, volunteer, or help out. Your input shapes the event.

forms.title: Favourite miHoYo Character
forms.desc: Vote for your favourite character — we’ll use results for activities and merch ideas.
